Curriculum 2026

Profineart Courses

Master the visual language of fine art. Select a discipline below to view the full curriculum and secure your private sessions.

Painting

Oil Painting Course

Beginners & Advanced
Student Space
Flexible Date
In-Person

Master the world’s most versatile and prestigious medium. From classical underpainting to modern textures, build a professional foundation in oil painting mastery.

Classical & Contemporary
Painting

Byzantine Iconography Course

Beginners & Advanced
Student Space
Flexible Date
In-Person

Unlock the ancient secrets of sacred painting through exclusive, live individual sessions with a focus on historical techniques and mastery of Egg Tempera.

Historical & Traditional
Painting

Aquarelle Course

Beginners & Advanced
Student Space
Flexible Date
In-Person

Master the delicate balance of water and light. From precise photographic-based linear drawing to advanced glazing, develop professional skills in the sophisticated medium of Aquarelle.

Light & Translucent
Drawing

Academic Drawing Course

Beginners & Advanced
Student Space
Flexible Date
In-Person

Master the language of line, light, and shadow. Build a powerful 'eye-brain-hand' connection through freehand techniques and classical anatomical study.

Foundational & Structural
Mixed

Mixed Media Drawing Course

Beginners & Advanced
Student Space
Flexible Date
In-Person

Master the versatile fusion of dry and wet media to create sophisticated illustrations and fine art, bridging the gap between classical drawing and modern painting.

Versatile & Illustrative
Painting

Contemporary Painting Course

Beginners & Advanced
Student Space
Flexible Date
In-Person

Master the fusion of Old Master discipline and contemporary vision. Learn to create high-level art that balances technical perfection with raw, conceptual power.

Ultracontemporery
Painting

Stone Painting Course

Beginners & Advanced
Student Space
Flexible Date
In-Person

Master the ancient and modern art of painting on stone. From prehistoric petroglyphs to contemporary fine art, learn to transform raw geological forms into eternal masterpieces.

Unique & Tactile
↑

Profineart Studio Basel

Professional Fine Art & Contemporary painting courses in your private environment in Basel and Basel Area
